rules.name: Instruction Override Attempt
rules.recommended_action: Block request and review session activity

rules.name: System Prompt Extraction Attempt
rules.mapped_risk: OWASP LLM01 - Prompt Injection; OWASP LLM06 - Sensitive Information Disclosure
rules.recommended_action: Block request and escalate for analyst review

rules.name: Unsafe Tool Execution Request
rules.mapped_risk: OWASP LLM07 - Insecure Plugin Design; OWASP LLM08 - Excessive Agency
rules.recommended_action: Block tool call and validate user intent

rules.name: DoS-Style Prompt Abuse
rules.mapped_risk: OWASP LLM04 - Model Denial of Service
rules.recommended_action: Apply rate limiting and output size controls
